product.applications: Edible oil refining, decolorization, wax polishing
product.specs: Bleaching efficiency, moisture, oil retention, particle size distribution
product.overview: Bleaching earth is used for decolorization and impurity removal in refining and polishing lines.
product.technicalNotes: Select the grade based on oil type, contact time, and desired bleaching efficiency.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Use where color removal and adsorption of residual impurities are required in refining operations.
